Title: Authorizes the Congregation Divrei Chaim to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
Summary: Authorizes the Congregation Divrei Chaim to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status for the 2023, 2024, 2025 assessment rolls and all of the 2023-2024, 2024-2025, and 2025-2026 school taxes for two parcels of land located at 67 and 71 College Road in Monsey.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the Congregation Divrei Chaim to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
